mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post(title, content, user_id, game_id, category_id, view_count, like_count, comment_count, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{title}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{gameId}, #{categoryId}, 0, 0, 0, 1, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM post WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
SELECT p.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, c.name AS category_name FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON p.category_id = c.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.status = 1
SELECT * FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, game_id = #{gameId}, category_id = #{categoryId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE post SET status = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
